_comment: Example Caelo package registry index (M16-3). Host a file like this in a git repo and point Caelo at its raw URL (Marketplace → Browse → Registry URL). Each 'url' is a raw download link to a .caelopkg bundle. See docs/PACKAGES.md.

packages.name: Ren'Py — New Scene
packages.author: Caelo
packages.description: Scaffold a new Ren'Py visual-novel scene (label, dialogue, choices, transitions).

packages.name: DAZ — Export Render to WebM
packages.author: Caelo
packages.description: Encode a DAZ Studio image-sequence render into a web-ready WebM (VP9) clip.

packages.name: Ren'Py — Visual Novel Starter
packages.author: Caelo
packages.description: A minimal Ren'Py project: one character, an intro scene with a branching choice, and a tidy game/ layout.
